Name: WormEatenPlanet
Notes: A set of three giant apples with a green caterpillar connecting them. The caterpillar's movement is divided into three stages; first one being controlled by a cutscene and other two being controlled by switches.

Point_arg0.Name: Point Behavior
Point_arg0.Description: Behavior of the caterpillar on this point.

Values.Notes: The caterpillar enters an apple at this point
The caterpillar comes to rest at this point, waiting for the next movement
The caterpillar leaves an apple at this point

SW_A.Description: Starts the second movement of the caterpillar.

SW_B.Description: Starts the third movement of the caterpillar.

Rail.Description: The path for the caterpillar to move on.

DemoCast.Description: Can take part in a cutscene. It's special cutscene nerve starts the first movement of the caterpillar.
